label: Stat part (outdoors)
description: Scales the stat depending on whether the pawn is indoors or outdoors.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factorIndoors.label: Factor (indoors)
factorIndoors.description: Stat multiplier applied when the pawn is in a roofed area.

factorOutdoors.label: Factor (outdoors)
factorOutdoors.description: Stat multiplier applied when the pawn is outdoors.
